name: Pumpkin Oat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine pumpkin, brown sugar, egg, milk, oil, oats, and raisins. Mix well until combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring just enough to moisten.
4. Spoon the batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Sprinkle crumb topping over the batter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve hot with homemade jelly or jam.
Crumb Topping:
1. In a bowl, combine 1/2 cup packed brown sugar, 1/2 cup sifted unbleached flour, 1 teaspoon pumpkin pie spice, and 2 tablespoons butter or regular margarine.
2. Mix until crumbly.
